summary: All five requirements are addressed in the diff. REQ-1 (auto-randomise quotes on mount), REQ-3 (BGM on Dashboard), REQ-4 (click sound on Doraemon image), and REQ-5 (entry sound on Our Memories) are implemented. REQ-2 is partially addressed but the implementation is questionable: instead of removing only the 6th item (index 5, zero-based) from the curated array, the code removes both the first and last elements via slice(1,-1), which removes two photos and may not remove the correct photo.

missing_requirements.requirement: Remove the 6th image (index 5, zero-based) from the curated photo array so that gallery only shows the remaining photos.
missing_requirements.reason: The implementation uses ALL_PHOTOS.slice(1, -1) which removes both the first and last items from the array (two photos removed), not just the 6th item (index 5). This does not satisfy the AC of rendering exactly one fewer photo while keeping all remaining photos intact.

hallucinated_features.description: Removing both the first and last photos from the gallery array via slice(1, -1), eliminating two photos instead of one.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asks to remove the single 6th image (index 5). The diff removes two photos (first and last of ALL_PHOTOS) which was not requested.
